header.message: I am a software engineer in my second year of university. I love creating websites, apps, and games, enjoying every challenge and the creative process.

about.maintext: I am a software engineer in my second year of university. I love creating websites, apps, and games, enjoying every challenge and the creative process. Technologies I've worked with:
about.animetext: Outside of my studies, I enjoy watching anime, especially Jujutsu Kaisen and Demon Slayer.

projects.pygame: Dino Adventure is a Python game using Pygame, inspired by Chrome's offline dinosaur game, but with added unique features.
projects.website: This site was created using HTML and CSS, with a custom design created in Photoshop. Download the Dino Adventure game here.
projects.unity: Dino Adventure is made with Unity, featuring gameplay mechanics and interactive elements scripted in C#.
projects.michael: Built with React.js, this site showcases my programming projects, skills, and accomplishments.
projects.leetcode: I also enjoy solving LeetCode problems, which help me enhance my coding skills through various programming challenges.
